scripts.dev: concurrently --names "api,app,admin" --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgMagenta.bold" --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev --prefix node-backend" "yarn --cwd church-app start" "npm run dev --prefix admin-panel"
scripts.build: concurrently --names "api,app" "npm run build --prefix node-backend" "yarn --cwd church-app web"
scripts.test: concurrently --names "api,app" "npm run test --prefix node-backend" "yarn --cwd church-app test"
scripts.lint: concurrently --names "api,app" "npm run lint --prefix node-backend" "yarn --cwd church-app lint"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix node-backend && yarn --cwd church-app install && npm install --prefix admin-panel
